verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord, You're beautiful Your face is all I seek And when Your eyes are on this child Your grace abounds to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord, please light the fire That once burned bright and clear Renew the lamp of my first love That burns with holy fear

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to take Your word and shine it all around But help me first just to live it Lord And when I'm doing fine Help me to never seek the crown For my reward is giving praise to You
